channel.title: Barking
channel.description: A collection of sounds and sentences — organised in different ways. Essentially no different from barkings of a dog.

item.title: — ing —
item.description: Look — Look now and here Look later and there Up, down, left, right

item.title: A Costume Speak
item.description: Disdain And then — the slow attempt To speak across a gap That’s not just thought

item.title: A Million Words
item.description: A million words — and more — I wrote To speak with final certainty What I knew And all I could ever know, as true

item.title: A Thousand Words
item.description: It is impossible to the know — Really and truly know — The meaning of anything I cannot even know the meaning

item.title: Abbatoir
item.description: It is not — It cannot be possible Never, not ever To be married

item.title: About Prayer
item.description: Could it be anything But an attitude If not Then it can only be —

item.title: Abrupt
item.description: Suddenly Without fanfare Anticipation Preparation

item.title: Absence Of Absence
item.description: Waking from sleep I know — In sleep there was absence Of all — of this world

item.title: Absurdity
item.description: The show must go on — For whose amusement For whose benefit These grotesque forms

item.title: Algorithm
item.description: Formulas sell Formula movies Good cop, bad cop Bad cop turned good

item.title: Aloneness
item.description: Sweetheart What must be Your Aloneness — Infinite

item.title: Alright
item.description: No more seeking What would I seek — Another job A house

item.title: An Arm's Length
item.description: I wish — I wish there were a way To reach you, touch you Somehow —

item.title: An'al Haq
item.description: Was it the Middle Ages When you were killed For speaking Saying —

item.title: Ancient Urge
item.description: Birds, I have heard Migrate — hundreds, thousands of miles They fly — Little birds

item.title: And Called It Love
item.description: Sex — Attraction Consummation Parting — and then again

item.title: Anomaly
item.description: There is one Only one Core distinction Between man and not-man

item.title: Another Meeting
item.description: Another meeting — An important one Like so many that came and went A moment in time

item.title: Another Name
item.description: Where in this world Is rest — Between birth and death The body, skin, molecules, cells

item.title: Anxiety
item.description: The me is anxious It is going to die None of what it writes, thinks, or does — None of its gains and losses —

item.title: Arrogance Of Death
item.description: Have I ever had an experience Of ceasing to be — No Quite the contrary—

item.title: Assumption And Perception
item.description: What we call objects Are but objectifications Of the subject We cannot see, nor call, an object

item.title: Asymmetrical Loss
item.description: Do you feel sad No longer see, hear, touch The one you loved Do you mourn

item.title: Atman
item.description: I have seen — Through the eyes Of birds, cats and bees Of countless unnamed species

item.title: Autopsy
item.description: They were married for 50 years She died fixated on her cellulite He died fixated on her skin She died fixated on his fixation on her skin

item.title: Awake
item.description: Gifts Unasked for — And curses No recipient

item.title: Awareness
item.description: No communication is possible Between two Apparently distinct objects Unless, in both

item.title: Barking Of Dogs
item.description: This act — does it show anything at all All these books, countless faces Unknowable words — Spoken, written, expressed —

item.title: Be Yourself
item.description: Let me explain to you my love Spare a moment Lend an ear Give an hour — a night

item.title: Because It Could
item.description: A poem Like a work of art A piece of music Building, monument, rocket

item.title: Becoming Unself
item.description: Strange that You come into your own — Become yourself Singular, unrepeatable

item.title: Beholding
item.description: Facsimile Of nothing Every which way Pilgrim no more

item.title: Being Struck
item.description: Being Struck The incapacity — Blindness to see As we are —

item.title: Beside
item.description: The withering leaf does not care What anyone sees or thinks — Of its fading, its life, its slow dissolution — Quiet, unseen

item.title: Between Silences
item.description: Right now I am here Sitting with my legs stretched As pigeons coo —

item.title: Between Worlds
item.description: There's an annoying — Sometimes not-so-annoying — Tendency you begin to notice Both in you

item.title: Bittersweet
item.description: If Happiness is An unrelenting undercurrent Of grief

item.title: Both Irrefutably
item.description: Individual sovereignty and no self Appear to be Mutually exclusive Even counter-cancelling

item.title: Bowed
item.description: Forever You will refuse to be put into words — Of sages, poets, and philosophers Of prophets and of scriptures

item.title: Cat And I
item.description: The cat Has never stopped Being the cat Through all these years

item.title: Cessation
item.description: Whoever, anywhere — Who stumbles upon Truth — Comes upon a truth identical

item.title: Closing
item.description: Gradually, it seems as if — The content of each hour, each day Has shrunk The extent of the world

item.title: Clothes
item.description: Animals wear no clothes Nor birds, nor insects Nor flies None ever appears indecent

item.title: Cobwebs
item.description: Traditions and Institutions Are the dead — That live As cobwebs

item.title: Cocoon
item.description: In my cocoon Don’t ask me of the world outside The headlines The wars, the destruction

item.title: Collective Delusion
item.description: If I had money I would do This And would not do

item.title: Confidant
item.description: I long for a confidant who knows My petty miseries Pointless struggles Fleeting pleasures —

item.title: Connection Myth
item.description: About my confusion — Indecision and predicament About this sense of drag Of being dragged

item.title: Consciousness
item.description: In every embrace of the day In the depths of the night Through every touch Amidst each sense

item.title: Consecrated Flicker
item.description: Some event forms — or so it seems Like the glimpse of a leaf blown by the wind The faint sound of footsteps in the distance A few birds in the sky, together briefly

item.title: Contentment
item.description: I came to explore The expanse Of my interminable reach — And that I did

item.title: Continuity
item.description: Hope is quiet Continuity — Like this moment blending Into the next

item.title: Control
item.description: I have failed — By any standards of the people And all of the world I have failed to achieve

item.title: Cost Of More
item.description: From the walls of a weathered home From the ordinary streets of an unassuming town Where you first learned to walk and talk — From a dust-strewn neighbourhood

item.title: Cost Of Space
item.description: Free speech What does it even mean This here is speech, set down on a page Free — unrestricted, and without cost

item.title: Cult
item.description: This fixation — Obsession — The singular preoccupation With a person —

item.title: Daily Bread
item.description: I would carve A path with The sword of light Forged in the fires

item.title: Daimon
item.description: There is such a thing — Though you may call it By another name — Dharma, integrity

item.title: De-Supposition
item.description: De-supposition Of the supposed questioner Of the knower Of the doer

item.title: Dear Heart
item.description: O dear heart — Beat slowly Slowly, slowly Nowhere to arrive —

item.title: Decree
item.description: Seeing my true form Bared of the scaffold Unveiled Unhindered

item.title: Dedication
item.description: Who is shattered Heartbroken Devastated What or who

item.title: Definition
item.description: Whatever defines you Confines you Without definition You are

item.title: Demigods
item.description: Demigods — like me, free To take a step, lift a finger, turn a gaze Attend to this, ignore that Whisper or shout

item.title: Devotion
item.description: At your feet In your house Bowed Wordless —

item.title: Dick Measuring Contest
item.description: Spiritual Dick measuring contest Mine: Advaita Yours: Neo-Advaita —

item.title: Direction
item.description: Do we not already know — That words make no sense No sense at all — Unless we already know

item.title: Dis-identification
item.description: Selfless doing — deed or act — Is an oxymoron Doing, deed, and act Without self

item.title: Disillusion
item.description: Getting lost in — and Returning from — Thought and images Future and past

item.title: Disquiet
item.description: What do you do With these moments — Instants and hours Days and weeks — year after year —

item.title: Dissolution
item.description: The buried seed breaks open So that the root can emerge and anchor underground Before shooting above ground The tiniest green bud —

item.title: Doer
item.description: There has never been Never will be Never can be — An unshakeable

item.title: Done
item.description: Who do you think you are Someone special Someone who matters Someone —

item.title: Dot
item.description: What would you call it When a dot Upon an infinite page Knows it’s dot —

item.title: Echoes
item.description: Echoes Can only form in closed spaces — Caves deep underground Or inner hollows

item.title: Echoes In Silence
item.description: What is love but echoes Of silent songs — Of Infinite aloneness — Rising in the boundless dark, where

item.title: Emptiness
item.description: Empty, not vacant Remote, not distant I am Rooted —

item.title: Empty Embodiment
item.description: Just because words can flow From fingers or mouths Of an entity — Doesn’t mean that the entity

item.title: Equanimity
item.description: No certainty No uncertainty No reaching No grasping

item.title: Equations
item.description: To exist equals To appear — to stand forth — Existent exists — Does not equal

item.title: Equilibrium
item.description: Walking along, for so long This way, that way — the right, the wrong Sometimes pushed, sometimes pulled Searching for this, waiting for that

item.title: Equivalence
item.description: Have you noticed The measure of life In any instant Any place

item.title: Eternal
item.description: You Can never, escape this world alive But the You, that can

item.title: Eternity
item.description: Ten thousand years and more I have stood In your gaze — Bright as day

item.title: Expression
item.description: We write not because We know something We write because only through it — We come to know

item.title: Extinction
item.description: The will to live Has died — out of me Or in me I don’t know which

item.title: Fabi Ayyi Ala I Rabbikuma Tukazziban
item.description: Lord — You don’t seem to care Or do you — People care, rally, march, protest, cry

item.title: False Self
item.description: Deflated — By stripping in public Selling what — really — Fragments of experience —

item.title: First Philosophy
item.description: If Philosophy's concerns is Life's meaning and worth Then suicide is

item.title: Flyer's Myth
item.description: What might one feel, who once flew high Burned and broken Fallen to the ground Among those who crawl —

item.title: Folding
item.description: I sleep And then, I wake Sit through the dark until dawn Knowing the entire world of the day

item.title: For Fuck's Sake
item.description: Why drown yourself In deep, dark waters Why not breathe Light and air

item.title: Found And Dropped
item.description: Cupped among branches Shaded up high — few sticks, twigs Some fur and feathers Secretions dried

item.title: Freezer
item.description: Minus 25 celsius Warehouse stacked with boxes Of frozen Potato chips, mash, peas, ice cream

item.title: Fuck The Dependable
item.description: Fuck all the metaphors The clichés Fuck them all What’s there

item.title: Futility
item.description: Futility raises its head Stirring in bed with death Before, during And after

item.title: Gateway
item.description: Philosophy Is the name For all things Related to thought

item.title: Genesis
item.description: Only If, only One could touch — Another

item.title: Ghosted Self
item.description: If self-possession means To possess the self Then it is A contradiction in terms

item.title: Ghosts
item.description: Unstated Just below the surface — Expectation Hopes and desires that

item.title: Gilded Shadows
item.description: Insatiable voyeurs Gathered around gallows Gorging on carrion — Dead spectacle

item.title: Given
item.description: Like space and time Like sun and stars, the wide sky, and grass Like night and day, mountains and trees — Like growing up and growing old

item.title: God Is A Jealous Lover
item.description: She would not tolerate That you turn toward and face — Even look at — Anyone but her

item.title: Godhead
item.description: God — whatever name we give it — Is necessary Absolutely necessary Existentially and philosophically

item.title: Good News
item.description: The days Of authority Penance And imprisonment —

item.title: Grace
item.description: Grace is not happenstance — Not some sudden or special moment of insight Not a lightning strike Nor an epiphany

item.title: Groceries
item.description: You cannot buy groceries With theories Or ideas — nor walk into a shop As disembodied consciousness

item.title: Groups For Groups
item.description: All societies All systems of government Stand upon — And conceal —

item.title: Growing Up
item.description: What’s growing up But seeing — And then seeing through The impossibilities

item.title: Half Awake
item.description: What life is this — This duration from waking To working To sleeping —

item.title: Half-Life
item.description: Double beds — Artefacts of desire Like treadmills bought In flashes of anticipation

item.title: Hall Of Mirrors
item.description: Do you really want to speak — The final truth Can you even speak Your own name

item.title: Hallucinating Factory
item.description: Another carrot Dangles over there Not here, not now but there — In the empty space and time

item.title: Hallucination
item.description: What’s all this noise — Tinnitus, thoughts Worries tangled with hopes Fears chasing desires

item.title: Heart
item.description: My father Lives in me His judging gaze looks out through me — Sometimes

item.title: Here
item.description: Human, or not — Here you are And here I am Here, then, is —

item.title: Here-ward
item.description: I keep returning To you — Inward Here-ward

item.title: Heretics
item.description: When they are dead They are exalted — centuries later Statues in public squares Plaques, streets, shrines

item.title: Hollow King
item.description: Poppycock of poppycocks — In a field sown thick with poppycocks Blarney of blarneys Absurdity of absurdities —

item.title: Human Condition
item.description: You speak — again — Expecting, hoping An embrace Touch

item.title: I — I know
item.description: Once again, it seems Reclined — dark all around No hope or fear Knowing all I face —

item.title: I Am That
item.description: What could I wish, knowing That I am As The Buddha Is As God, The All Knower

item.title: I Am-ing
item.description: To say I am requires Language Experience And their meeting

item.title: I Equals Body
item.description: The very fact of this expression Makes it irrefutable That the body exists If it weren’t, these words wouldn’t arise —

item.title: Identity
item.description: I am God He said excitedly Approaching my desk — A sign held out before him

item.title: If/ Then
item.description: If there’s something I cannot know I am not omniscient If God knows all that is God is omniscient

item.title: Ignorance
item.description: Agents of organised religions — Theologians, evangelists Have the impulse To look outside

item.title: Illusory Self
item.description: Illusory self is narration — No narration No illusory self But not all narration —

item.title: Imago
item.description: O Man An infant, newborn, yet to be Decrepit, old, lame and dumb O Man

item.title: Improbability
item.description: There’s something strange Improbable about — Being at ease Within a stretch —

item.title: In Defence Of Thought
item.description: This little mind — This automatic, self-starting machinery Of thinking, labelling, planning, scheming, judging Of plotting, wanting, hoping, replaying

item.title: In My Bed
item.description: In my bed — Never a second late Or an instant too soon — Universe comes

item.title: In The First Place
item.description: Without a self To be shamed — be proud The yardstick against which Words and deeds are measured

item.title: Indivisibility
item.description: To say there are two things One of which does not exist — To say awareness alone is true And appearance false, untrue, or unreal —

item.title: Ineffable
item.description: I am the mystic, the sage The saint and the idiot I am the lunatic The murderer

item.title: Infiltration
item.description: Thought is the only thing That seeks to continue Being without form — It infiltrates form — human —

item.title: Insatiability
item.description: No experience Of this world or any other Can ever satisfy Or be enough

item.title: Integration
item.description: Dearest — You are the word That I speak How can I say

item.title: Invisible Ink
item.description: I do not recall a day or time When I entered into an agreement — signed a contract — With the world at large, a group A society, a country, a religion

item.title: Irreducible Aloneness
item.description: Who can I speak to Who hears me — Talking to myself My whole life

item.title: Is Forever
item.description: Nothing is not nothing It is something Nothing cannot be It can be a word —

item.title: Ishq
item.description: Who sits For an hour or two Bound — Wide-eyed, enraptured

item.title: Just This
item.description: If I imagined — If I could shape days and nights Draw how each might unfold Decide what I’d feel

item.title: Khudi
item.description: In whose selfhood I was Before arriving as self — My mother that is In whose selfhood I will be

item.title: Kun
item.description: Beyond The veil There is a room A big room

item.title: Lam Yalid Wa Lam Yulad
item.description: Essence refers to — Can only refer to — Must refer to — An object of perception

item.title: Left Coat
item.description: Do you remember the coat You used to love — Brown, woven with black And white threads —

item.title: Life
item.description: Can life be known Directly — First-hand Like I can know a cup —

item.title: Lullaby
item.description: How, lord — How How could You Be

item.title: Machinery
item.description: Complaints, allegations, accusations Meetings, arrests, transfers Examinations, histories, admissions Confinements

item.title: Mania
item.description: The vine — Teeming with flowers Burdened by leaves — Branches surging

item.title: Manufacture Of Lack
item.description: Does attractiveness signify A presence — quality or quantity — In the object perceived Or is it lack —

item.title: Marching In Place
item.description: As if time were a line We fall in to march Second by second From an imagined beginning

item.title: Mercy
item.description: What if life were not futile — If it held a meaning, a purpose Would it be more worth living If there were an end goal

item.title: Metaphysical Rot
item.description: Bullshit Pathetic rubbish Phlegm and spit Inconsequential grot

item.title: Metaphysics
item.description: From all practical perspectives Physical, psychological, emotional Social, cultural, financial Living is futile

item.title: Mind
item.description: Mind Is the mechanism Beheld, beholder and beholding Of appearing

item.title: Mind Alone
item.description: Images Do not contact eyes But mind Objects

item.title: Misnomer
item.description: In the absence of a self That could cast reflection — What does — what can — Self-reflection mean

item.title: Mortar
item.description: You experience intimacy In proximity — Of someone To preserve that —

item.title: Negation
item.description: No system is an open system A system by definition — Is closed There is no possibility, therefore

item.title: Neither God Nor Me
item.description: Who is God — Without me Constrained, flummoxed Bamboozled

item.title: Never Get There
item.description: Where do you go — Cleaning the house Watching TV — More of the same

item.title: No Longer
item.description: Where have you gone O heart Why do you no longer Yearn, desire, and ache

item.title: No Me Nowhere
item.description: I have looked Up and down Right and left Deep inside

item.title: No Mind
item.description: No mind Refers to an absurd Conceptual negation Of mind

item.title: No Other
item.description: How could one possibly Ever Love another When there is not

item.title: No Path
item.description: Did you really think That there could be Paths In infinity —

item.title: No-Self
item.description: For long — sometimes too long — Nothing comes To replace the demolished ruins Ashes and dust cloud

item.title: No-Self Talk
item.description: All talk Is no-self talk Why Because there is no one out there

item.title: Non-attachment
item.description: Rendered incapable Of believing Of suspending disbelief Of common pleasures

item.title: Nonduality
item.description: There can only be Two possibilities Either I Equals God

item.title: None
item.description: Late-nights won’t always be here Nor early mornings, late evenings No days will be here No sun, no sky

item.title: Not-duality
item.description: What I am Is not present, but absent For whenever I look for this I, I find No one

item.title: Not-Mutes
item.description: What would you call it When two people Share a house, a bed But never touch, never see

item.title: not-Paradox
item.description: I am equal To all the Buddhas Of all times No sage or saviour —

item.title: Nothing Alone
item.description: What does thinking conclude That every thing — Including thinking and thought — Ceases to be

item.title: Nothing Is At Stake
item.description: What is the best way to dream Can a dream be successful — purpose-driven, ethical Congruent, integrated, moral Is there a way to dream

item.title: Nothing To Do With Him
item.description: Through writing — Man gives himself substantiation That does not exist In him

item.title: Now
item.description: In reviewing tomorrow’s Each step as yesterday’s Today becomes The only new day

item.title: Nowhere
item.description: This world woken up By physicality’s calls — Suspended in sleep Shows ethereality’s world

item.title: Oblivion
item.description: Waking state Dream state Sleep state In any state

item.title: Older As Young
item.description: I was older as young Growing younger as adult Caught in adolescence During adulthood

item.title: On Objectification
item.description: So I’m told not to objectify When I see a cat, I shouldn’t see a cat But a living being What if I have a teddy bear

item.title: On Your Own
item.description: As a husband Or wife — Have you never thought You might live more easily

item.title: One And Other
item.description: The third May be one alone The mask, the bridge Between one and other

item.title: One Gaze
item.description: All distinctions — Are false No distinction Between outer

item.title: One-Way
item.description: Civility is a one-way door That once entered Brands shame In the gap between skin

item.title: Orphan
item.description: Orphan What writes Is there writing — Word, sound, feeling

item.title: Ox-Press
item.description: Drinking Sobering Drinking Sobering

item.title: Paradox
item.description: I’d rather be nobody In a place where Anyone can be anybody Than be somebody

item.title: Pavement Sutra
item.description: Walking back After eight hours in an office Relieved to have finished The tasks — the jobs —

item.title: Perfection
item.description: Expression and perfection Must be synonymous If not — Perfection of an expression

item.title: Playthings
item.description: All that I ever sought Was an object All that I ever worked for Was an object

item.title: Positive Thinking
item.description: It’s not all havoc Not all wars and invasions — Displacement, destruction, death Not all corruption, propaganda, division

item.title: Power
item.description: What’s the difference Between one who bares their flesh And one who lays bare their soul — Their mind, their heart —

item.title: Prayer
item.description: Lord — Is it I Who forgets you — Or you

item.title: Presence
item.description: What if I didn’t think Right now I’d sit Or lie down

item.title: Products And Services
item.description: What can the body Ever want From another body Comfort

item.title: Prophet's Dilemma
item.description: Sticks and stones break your bones — After Your words have broken Whole worlds

item.title: Protector Parrots
item.description: Prosecutors, panels and parrots Protectors of the regulatory order Judging whether the public — Conjured ghosts —

item.title: Proxy
item.description: One word Just say — today I know you wouldn’t So I’ll speak

item.title: Purgatory
item.description: Early morning And ready for work A cup of tea, scone Jeans, T-shirt, tatty hoodie

item.title: Purge
item.description: Life like sky — Boundless Stocked full Of titillating, scintillating

item.title: Quiet Desperation
item.description: Job interviews Sitting before panels It isn’t the sitting I despise But the waiting —

item.title: Rabba
item.description: Rabba — Not even you And only you — Exactly like me

item.title: Reader-Writer
item.description: As soon as I stop reading Writing stops As soon as I start reading Writing begins

item.title: Refutation
item.description: How long have I been awake I do not know How long have I been dreaming I do not know

item.title: Residues
item.description: Carrying yesterday on my back I went to bed last night Sitting on my chest I found it this morning

item.title: Retrofitting
item.description: The perspective and focus Of psychology — Is entirely retroactive Absurdly, comically

item.title: Revolt
item.description: Seeing his insignificance — What can man do But rebel against Or laugh in the face of

item.title: Riddled With Doubt
item.description: I doubt If tonight will come — Let alone tomorrow If any word written or read

item.title: Risk Assessment
item.description: That sheep in a herd of sheep That one there — Second from left, third row From the front

item.title: Rock Bottom
item.description: Screaming, shouting, yelling — Whispering, talking Stumbling, dancing Stuttering, chasing

item.title: Sacrament
item.description: So you don’t confess Your pain and sorrow To the priest anymore You don’t bow

item.title: Safety Blanket
item.description: If you could choose Would you forego Long life — passionless — For a short one

item.title: Same I
item.description: 2016 - 2066 Etched in iron On a drain cover In the road

item.title: Same Old Shit
item.description: Old shit New shit Same old shit Isn’t that

item.title: Samsara
item.description: Trapped in a world Of competing demands — From inside and out Longing to rest

item.title: Schmutz
item.description: That layer of ingrained Dust — grime — That comes from touch On your hands

item.title: Seamless
item.description: Seamlessly blended In unbroken beholding — A million senses This —

item.title: Second Hand God
item.description: Religious fanatics — Haunted By their holy books Academics —

item.title: Shadow
item.description: Why speak of integrating something — That you do not cast That does not belong to you That has no will of its own

item.title: Shoddy Bastards
item.description: Salesmen, mechanics, engineers of flesh and mind Tinkerers of the soul — Always fixing, always selling For centuries

item.title: Silence
item.description: When all narratives end — All recollections Imaginings dissolve When all speech

item.title: Sitting In Silence
item.description: Shall I sit In silence Very well then — I shall sit in silence

item.title: Size Of Concern
item.description: Does the size Of a concern Depend upon its life-or-death stakes Or

item.title: Sleep's Sky
item.description: In the quiet dark — Spark all worlds Swirling beneath eyes closed And displayed out in open —

item.title: So Simple
item.description: It was all So simple So clear Transparent

item.title: Solitude
item.description: For long, I have longed To speak to you the way I speak to myself For long I could not find you — Always away or lost in thoughts

item.title: Source
item.description: Not a wavering will but The Unwavering Source Inspires and drives This

item.title: Sovereignty
item.description: The individual possesses — Inherent sovereignty Not granted, not derived Irrevocable

item.title: Spacetime
item.description: Have I ever experienced Time itself What I experience is motion — A process of going through —

item.title: Spirituality
item.description: Embodiment — What a product In the cornucopia Of spirituality

item.title: Split-Mind
item.description: Split — Mind is That which Cannot tolerate what is

item.title: Stillness In Motion
item.description: Ephemerality perceived In a wisp of breeze On your skin A ray of light

item.title: Stir
item.description: Something stirs That is all there is — That is all there will ever be Something

item.title: Strays
item.description: Do I still behave the same — As I did as a child I sit and write Thoughts that come to me

item.title: Suicide
item.description: One life ends One consciousness — one mind — Ends Others do not

item.title: Summum Bukmun Umyum
item.description: Like me Around the globe Searching eyes — seeking heads — awaken Reach for words, images, future possibilities

item.title: Surface
item.description: The who And the what That’s born And dies —

item.title: Surrender
item.description: Peace, O Peace Your Majesty Untouched Still

item.title: Sweetheart
item.description: Sweetheart — If I could say to you Something true What would I say

item.title: Talking Shit
item.description: Talking through their asses Rather than mouths Or through their mouths What ought to come out of their asses

item.title: Tat Tvam Nasi
item.description: Is God — Or whatever is called The ultimate — Aware of —

item.title: Tawaf
item.description: I speak — write To you And if neither I Nor you are substantial

item.title: That I Am
item.description: Could I think — Without word The question contains Its answer

item.title: That I Be
item.description: Awake I return To a world entirely unique — sensed, remembered Narrated only by me Asleep it washes, like dust off a mirror

item.title: That-Which-Perceives-Form
item.description: Form Is that-which-perceives form That-which-perceives form Is both form and

item.title: The Accomplishment
item.description: What is domestication But hardwiring In the psyche — Laying tracks in the mind

item.title: The Addict
item.description: What does The so-called addict Truly know — If not this

item.title: The Aloneness
item.description: The aloneness — In man’s heart Is God’s It is out of that

item.title: The Blind Seer
item.description: I may appear to be this person — Carrying this frame Shuffling slowly Aimlessly sitting

item.title: The Boy
item.description: The boy said I also need my own space — Not a room Shared with others

item.title: The Brew
item.description: I wake in the morning To the sounds Of wild beasts — Or the rain pattering

item.title: The Broken Tool
item.description: You can never say a single thing About truth, love Beauty Or being

item.title: The Divine
item.description: What can ever truly be — Divine Is it silence — awareness — emptiness — God — Brahman —

item.title: The Dreaming-I
item.description: There was a person I was speaking to About something — or nothing In a dream I had And then I woke up

item.title: The Empty Instant
item.description: What would I do with a longer life With a few thousand hours Even these moments — Of what use is time to me

item.title: The First Cause
item.description: Elephant — In the room That boardroom — Or that cell

item.title: The Forgetting Itself
item.description: Shame virus Slithering through every vein of this world A plague caught at birth The master leash

item.title: The Gap
item.description: Only through observation Of another’s demise Is mortality, time, and finiteness Concocted

item.title: The God Complex
item.description: Wouldn’t you grant Absolute, tangible Incontrovertible Free will

item.title: The Holy Ghost
item.description: Like a barrel scraped raw — drained dry — Purged to the last drop — But what truly spilled out When something still clings

item.title: The Howling
item.description: On this Godforsaken land of men I waited for a man — Not a caricature Not calm, perfect or radiant —

item.title: The Image Inside
item.description: It is never For the person But for the appearance — The image —

item.title: The Impossible Knowing
item.description: Life means self Self means life No self, no life No life, no self

item.title: The Industry
item.description: Am I allowed To be intolerant, childish, adolescent — Immature, petulant Lazy, self-absorbed

item.title: The Invasion
item.description: The Invasion How do I know That I am me Because this room

item.title: The Last Idol
item.description: Value is a word that once ingested Seeks to find a place to settle Not unlike truth — it is a contaminant that Scours the earth, soars in the skies

item.title: The Last Nothing
item.description: There is no self There is only self What does it matter — What is said

item.title: The Lost Lineage
item.description: Truth is not a democracy Yet we vote for it daily Research the market Gather a focus group

item.title: The Lot Of The Lot
item.description: In the forest a river shows From what it comes And to what it goes — I don’t know

item.title: The Mirror Sage
item.description: There is a sage — A seer, did you hear There A man like most, who sits and sees

item.title: The Myth Of Unaltered States
item.description: Particles pulsing, swirling In boundless expanse Forms fleetingly shaped Through mind’s ephemeral lens

item.title: The Naked Heresy
item.description: Is it taboo To wed your sister Lie with your mother Or couple with a beast

item.title: The Pilgrimage
item.description: A staircase Of one hundred twenty-five thousand Skulls Leading down —

item.title: The Placeless
item.description: From where do I come Wherein do I reside As what do I live And to what do I return

item.title: The Poor Sod
item.description: Without distance — What is suffering Perceiver — perceiving perceived Not-suffering

item.title: The Question
item.description: The problem — Whatever the problem may be Between birth and death — Is always

item.title: The Same Gaze
item.description: Day: one million Is it not the millionth — And the first — day What makes it feel this way —

item.title: The Shape Of Absence
item.description: Dancing words, appearing like puppets — Dressed pretty in sombre mood Trying to draw the shape of me A line there

item.title: The Sightless Eye
item.description: No word No sound No thought Can ever be spoken

item.title: The Speaking Pond
item.description: I see — But do I That there Is reflected in me

item.title: The Still Point
item.description: Clearly — What feels like waiting — Before anything seems to happen — Is not emptiness —

item.title: The Unnatural Recognition
item.description: For all practical purposes From birth till death — To be in form As human or animal

item.title: The Vehicle
item.description: To engage In the impossible feat Of communication Across space and time

item.title: The Word
item.description: Could you hear, see, feel, or answer Those burned, hanged, torn apart Stoned to death In your name, in vain

item.title: Therapy
item.description: Can you give therapy to a tomato plant — That grows wild Shooting branches every which way Climbing, winding into every crevice

item.title: There
item.description: You don’t want to go Anywhere — The world makes you go This body, that’s not you, makes you

item.title: Thief
item.description: There are many kinds Of griefs — For what is lost What will be lost

item.title: This Bed
item.description: This bed — My battlefield All my wars are fought Lost and won

item.title: This Is It
item.description: This Is It THIS is it This IS it This is IT

item.title: This, Or That
item.description: What’s the simplest thing The fact of being Not being this — or that But just being

item.title: This, Very Here
item.description: They never see The real me They see what I wear Imagine what lies beneath

item.title: Those Who Know: Speak
item.description: For an entire lifetime I wrote Wondering If I might stumble

item.title: Threshold
item.description: Hear, O watcher — Listener Seer Of this world

item.title: Through Your Eyes
item.description: Precious people Live in my heart — Some gone, some still here — But all, they live there just the same

item.title: Throughlines
item.description: My story with A, from 1 to 5 With B, from 2 to 4 C, from 3 to 6 D, from 7 to 9

item.title: To —
item.description: God Not a single word more Have I got left to say Not a single gesture more

item.title: To Myself
item.description: To who else but myself Have I been writing My whole life Entertaining

item.title: To See
item.description: Who goes to another for answers I did — But it was not the others I went to

item.title: To Whom But You
item.description: Allah Mian — Dear Allah Mian To whom but You Can a man speak

item.title: To Whom It May Concern
item.description: Thank you Even though I don’t know you — Who — or what — do I thank, then Can’t thank myself —

item.title: Trumpet
item.description: This body Vessel — And the only Trumpet of God

item.title: Turn
item.description: I heard you speak Through loudspeakers From towering places — Day and night relentless —

item.title: Two Deaths
item.description: Unaware Of being aware The body sleeps Wakes, lives

item.title: Two-gatherness
item.description: We try for lifetimes To feel, to touch — Hold tight, draw close To experience togetherness —

item.title: Umbilical Cord
item.description: What happened When the cord was cut — Separation One became two

item.title: Un —
item.description: To be full You must be empty To be empty You must be null

item.title: Underbelly
item.description: Writing is Like exhibitionism Stripping to see — What wouldn’t have been seen

item.title: Undercurrent
item.description: Beauty and love What Without the undercurrent Of passing

item.title: Unestablished
item.description: This camera is simultaneously capturing and displaying A three-dimensional world of height, width and depth Complete with sensory textures Its lenses are eyes

item.title: Unfitting Costume
item.description: I am acting Wearing a costume That does not fit With badges

item.title: Unhindered
item.description: Unhindered By demands of decorum And right manner Of speaking

item.title: Uniqueness
item.description: The path of no one else Can ever Be yours Tracing the paths

item.title: Unknowability
item.description: What if one secretly filmed A person’s every movement — Day and night For a week, a month, or even a year —

item.title: Unknowable
item.description: Is there something I’m missing You wonder Is there another place Another state

item.title: Unmeasured
item.description: Grade me — On scales, or measuring tapes By my size, shape or form Steps and dexterity

item.title: Unnameable
item.description: Will not be defined Will not be described Will not be conceived Will not be perceived

item.title: Unnamed
item.description: Having forgotten Who or what I am supposed to be I wander Days and nights

item.title: Unorbiting
item.description: That person — The centre of my life Every day for decades To whom I was tethered

item.title: Unoriginated
item.description: Have I ever said anything truly original Can I write a single word that is mine alone Can I will one thought into being — One not borrowed, not received

item.title: Unowned
item.description: My words are your words — Neither yours nor mine Flowing from a stream Before you, before me —

item.title: Unquestioning
item.description: I am jealous Sometimes — Not jealous, but quietly envious Perhaps appreciative

item.title: Unseduced
item.description: Stopping seeing distortion Does not mean stopping seeing It means seeing undistorted Disillusionment —

item.title: Unseen Form
item.description: If I were a speck of dust That could experience the world — And my own being — Just as I do

item.title: Unsummable
item.description: Summing up — again Again Or the only time The only instant there is —

item.title: Untitled
item.description: For hours — I sit Just sit, sipping tea Occasional wandering thoughts

item.title: Vanishing Point
item.description: What’s a play In which — about which — You cannot tell Whether you are the audience

item.title: Vanity
item.description: All is vanity — Maya Attainments — conceit Meanings — Barking of a dog

item.title: War On Myself
item.description: Is cancer winning Let’s outsmart it Beat it, battle it, fight it Conquer the cancer

item.title: We Sense
item.description: We think That we think We sense Not think

item.title: Wedge
item.description: Privacy is an unholy marriage A wedge — Between truth And fear

item.title: What Medicine Tonight
item.description: What medicine Would you choose Tonight A brew of Ayahuasca

item.title: When I Just See
item.description: Why would I care to know The speed of light The incalculable distance between stars Counts of galaxies and cosmic infinity

item.title: Where The Dead Once Lived
item.description: How does someone Take residence — in your heart — When they don’t even know It’s where they live

item.title: Whiskey
item.description: What's most revolting Repulsive, odious, loathsome Noxious, soul-crushing, corrosive Pestilent — abhorrent —

item.title: Who Cares
item.description: You are not a human being In a universe, he says Then another one says the same And another

item.title: Whom Shall I Mourn
item.description: Whom shall I mourn With this aching heart My brothers Sisters, mothers and their children

item.title: Why The Fuck
item.description: Why profanity Speak and write without it No need for those words — You know the ones

item.title: Without Script
item.description: Playing on the stage We each play our part — Never knowing our lines We make them on the spot

item.title: Without The Word
item.description: Words are the building blocks Of thought Thoughts are the building blocks Of the universe

item.title: Wonder
item.description: Unimaginable depths Still — Pregnant Incomprehensibly contained

item.title: Words
item.description: These words, and a million more — Walking, igniting, lighting Mapping the edges, depths — The infinitude

item.title: Worth Of An Hour
item.description: From 5:19 to 6:19 Idle in bed Drinking tea Looking at the screen

item.title: Written Off
item.description: Who shall I ask Who shall I ask — Who — shall I ask About this daily pain

item.title: Yet
item.description: You can’t be in — This world There’s only being — And no one to be

item.title: Your Order
item.description: How shall I spread How do I bend Washed, shaved Brushed and ready —

item.title: Your View
item.description: Your View Has anything ever Happened — A second too soon Or an instant too late
